message:
chore(fcp-audit): remove accidentally-tracked insta .snap.new artifact

`crates/fcp-audit/tests/snapshots/golden_receipts__decision_receipt_allow_minimal.snap.new`
was accidentally committed back in 5ececde6 ("test: add google-drive
ConnectorSuite happy-path integration"). `.snap.new` files are insta's
transient accept-staging artifacts — they exist between `cargo insta
test` generating a fresh snapshot and the developer running `cargo
insta accept` to promote the `.new` to the full `.snap`.

The accepted `.snap` version already exists at
`.../golden_receipts__decision_receipt_allow_minimal.snap` (268 bytes,
committed through the normal insta workflow), so removing the `.new`
sibling is a pure cleanup — no test coverage is lost.

grep across the tracked tree confirms this was the only `.snap.new`
artifact that slipped in; everything else follows the `.snap`-only
pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
